title: Ubiquiti UACC-PSU-54V-1200W - Enterprise Hot-Swappable Power Module (1,200W)
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative Ubiquiti UniFi Enterprise Hot-Swappable Power Module is a accessories from the Enterprise series, designed for business environments The 1200W power supply is intended as a replacement unit for the ECS-48-PoE , or as an alternative to the original power supplies for the ECS-24-PoE to increase the PoE budget Power supply 230V Power cable Cable management accessories
